x-enumeration-literals.name: Check Positive Pay
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Matches check number, issue date, and amount of presented checks against a pre-submitted list of authorized checks.

Comment:
Example: A company submits a daily check issue file; any check not on the file is flagged.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payee Positive Pay
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Includes verification of the payee name along with check details.

Comment:
Example: A check to Jane Doe is rejected if presented as Janet Doe.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ACH Positive Pay
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Verifies ACH debit or credit transactions against an authorized ACH file.

Comment:
Example: Only pre-approved vendor ACH debits are allowed; others are flagged.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Wire Positive Pay
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Verifies wire transfer instructions against pre-approved wire lists.

Comment:
Example: A wire to a new vendor is blocked until manually approved by the client.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reverse Positive Pay
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The client reviews all presented payments before funds are released, instead of relying on automatic matching.

Comment: 
Example: The bank provides a report of presented checks; the client approves or rejects each payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exception Handling Positive Pay
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines actions for any mismatched payments: reject, review, or approve.

Comment:
Example: A check amount mismatch triggers an alert for manual approval.
